project_reference.name: PylaAI/PylaAI

observed_public_architecture.capture: bettercam + producer/consumer frame queue with maxsize=1
observed_public_architecture.inference: ONNX Runtime sessions with CUDA / DirectML / CPU fallback

safe_reuse_in_this_repo: HSV/template/OCR helpers for UI state detection

primary_training_sources.name: Roboflow Brawl Stars Dataset by Bloxxy
primary_training_sources.recommended_use: bootstrap detector for player/enemy/wall/bush/object classes, then fine-tune on own captures

primary_training_sources.name: Roboflow Brawl Stars model by brawl-stars-nyluk
primary_training_sources.recommended_use: class taxonomy reference, not enough images as primary dataset

primary_training_sources.name: Roboflow Brawlstars Screenshots by kwilexs Workspace
Roboflow tibia health mana bar
primary_training_sources.recommended_use: reference for health/status bar detection patterns, not Brawl-specific

asset_sources_for_synthetic_data.name: tailsjs/brawl-stars-assets
asset_sources_for_synthetic_data.notes: Large asset archive; useful for synthetic sprites, UI assets, icons, templates, and class-name metadata. Check Fan Content Policy and repository licensing before redistribution.

asset_sources_for_synthetic_data.name: LaptopCat/bs-fankit-rehosted
asset_sources_for_synthetic_data.notes: Useful for synthetic overlays, brawler portraits, UI elements, and templates; assets remain Supercell property.

capture_sources: own emulator sessions in controlled environment
recorded videos converted into sampled frames
synthetic composites from permitted fan/content assets
